plugins.microphonePermission: Allow NC Main Chat Remote to send microphone replies to NeuralCompanion.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow NC Main Chat Remote to read Visual Reply images for sharing.
plugins.savePhotosPermission: Allow NC Main Chat Remote to save Visual Reply images to your photo library.

plugins.cameraPermission: Allow NC Main Chat Remote to scan NeuralCompanion pairing QR codes.

infoPlist.NSLocalNetworkUsageDescription: NC Main Chat Remote connects to NeuralCompanion on your local network.
